title: Alkaline
description: A modpack that empowers Minecraft content creators with essential tools and features to enhance their videos and engage their audience.
body:
# Overview
Welcome to the *Alkaline Modpack*, a carefully curated collection of mods designed specifically for Minecraft content creators. This modpack aims to enhance your gameplay experience and streamline your video production process. With an array of essential tools and features, *Alkaline* empowers you to engage your audience like never before, turning every session into a captivating adventure.

[![Modrinth](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/raw/2dc967fc44dc73850eee42c133a55c8ffc5e30cb/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/alkaline)

[![FabricMC](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/raw/2dc967fc44dc73850eee42c133a55c8ffc5e30cb/assets/compact/supported/fabric_vector.svg)](https://fabricmc.net)

## Key Features

### HUD and Gameplay Enhancements
- **Better Mount HUD:** This mod improves the HUD while riding mounts, displaying vital information like speed and health. For streamers, this means less distraction from gameplay and more focus on delivering an engaging narrative, ensuring viewers never miss key moments during adventures.

- **Better Third Person:** Perfect for capturing stunning visuals, this mod enhances the third-person camera view, allowing creators to showcase their character and surroundings in a cinematic way. Whether filming epic battles or breathtaking landscapes, the improved angles help deliver a more immersive experience for viewers.

- **BetterF3:** Transform the standard debug HUD into a highly customizable, human-readable interface. This mod provides creators with essential information at a glance, reducing clutter and enhancing the overall viewing experience. It allows streamers to focus more on gameplay rather than interpreting complex data.

- **Gamma Utils (Fullbright):** Illuminate dark areas in the game with full brightness and night vision options. This feature helps creators explore caves and dungeons without losing visibility, ensuring that all exciting moments are clearly captured and presented in their videos.

### Performance Optimization
- **Sodium:** As the fastest rendering optimization mod available, Sodium dramatically improves frame rates and reduces lag. This allows creators to record smooth, uninterrupted gameplay, which is crucial for producing high-quality content that keeps viewers engaged.

- **Lithium:** This optimization mod enhances game logic and server performance without compromising gameplay. For streamers, this ensures that their sessions run seamlessly, minimizing technical hiccups that could disrupt live streams or recordings.

- **Krypton:** By optimizing the networking stack, Krypton reduces latency and improves connectivity. This is especially beneficial for multiplayer content, where a smooth connection enhances the overall experience for both creators and viewers, facilitating better collaboration and engagement.

- **ModernFix:** A comprehensive performance improvement mod that reduces memory usage and fixes bugs. It ensures a stable gameplay experience, allowing creators to focus on delivering entertaining content without worrying about crashes or slowdowns.

### Video Creation Tools
- **Flashback:** Capture and replay gameplay sessions effortlessly. This mod allows creators to highlight key moments or create cinematic sequences, enriching their storytelling capabilities and making it easier to craft engaging narratives.

- **Iris Shaders:** Transform Minecraft's visuals with stunning shader effects. High-quality graphics not only attract viewers but also help create a more immersive experience, making content more appealing and engaging.

- **Chunks Fade In:** Add smooth fade-in animations for loading chunks, enhancing the visual flow of your videos. This feature provides a polished look, ensuring that transitions feel seamless and professional, keeping viewers captivated.

### Community Engagement

#### Communication
- **Chat Animation [Smooth Chat]:** Engage your audience with chat messages that appear with smooth animations. This dynamic presentation keeps viewers interested and involved in the conversation, making streams more interactive and lively.

- **Simple Voice Chat:** Foster real-time communication with friends and fellow creators. This mod enhances collaboration during gameplay, allowing for richer interactions and creating memorable moments that viewers will love.

#### World Management
- **Cherished Worlds:** Easily bookmark and organize favorite worlds for quick access. This feature allows creators to switch seamlessly between projects, making it easy to showcase different builds or gameplay styles during streams.

- **World Host:** Host your singleplayer worlds online effortlessly, allowing friends or audiences to join without the hassle of server setups. This feature makes it simple for creators to share their adventures, fostering community engagement.

### Customization and Control

#### Configuration Tools
- **Cloth Config API:** This user-friendly library enables creators to customize their mod settings easily. Tailoring the gameplay experience ensures that each session meets specific content needs, allowing for greater creativity and flexibility.

- **Mod Menu:** Quickly access and manage installed mods with an intuitive menu. This allows creators to enable or disable features on the fly, ensuring their gameplay aligns with their current content objectives.

#### Building Tools

- **Axiom:** This all-in-one tool for editing Minecraft worlds is perfect for content creators looking to enhance their building experience. Axiom allows for precise edits, enabling you to quickly modify terrain and structures without the hassle, which is essential for showcasing creative projects in videos.

- **WorldEdit:** A powerful in-game map editor that provides an extensive range of features, including selections, schematics, copy and paste, brushes, and scripting. Whether you're in creative mode or temporarily using it in survival, WorldEdit makes it easy to bring your visions to life. Streamers can use this tool to create impressive builds on-the-fly, captivating their audience with rapid transformations and unique designs.

### Additional Features
- **Capes:** Personalize your character with stylish capes from various mods, adding a unique flair to your gameplay. This not only enhances your character's appearance but also makes your content visually distinctive and memorable.

- **No Chat Reports:** Enjoy a more private chat experience, keeping conversations unreportable (where possible). This encourages open dialogue and interaction among viewers and streamers, fostering a relaxed and enjoyable atmosphere.

## Conclusion
Incorporating mods into your Minecraft gameplay not only enhances your experience but also significantly boosts the quality of your content. With improved visuals, streamlined mechanics, and community engagement tools, *Alkaline* provides everything you need to create, inspire, and captivate your audience. Embrace the power of mods and transform your Minecraft content creation today!


<details>
<summary>List Of Mods Used In This Modpack</summary>

- [**Better Mount HUD**](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud) - Improves the ingame HUD while riding a mount
- [**Better Ping Display [Fabric]**](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric) - Adds a configurable numerical ping display to the player list
- [**Better Statistics Screen**](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats) - A Minecraft mod that improves the statistics screen and makes it more useful.
- [**Better Third Person**](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person) - Improves third person camera view.
- [**BetterF3**](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) - BetterF3 is a mod that replaces Minecraft's original debug HUD with a highly customizable, more human-readable HUD.
- [**Bobby**](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) - Allows for render distances greater than the server's view-distance
- [**Capes**](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes) - Lets you use capes from OptiFine, LabyMod and other cape mods
- [**Chat Animation [Smooth Chat]**](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatanimation) - Makes chat messages appear with a smooth animation.
- [**Cherished Worlds**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cherished-worlds) - Favorite/pin/bookmark certain worlds, which will always be at the top of the list and cannot be deleted.
- [**Chunks fade in**](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunks-fade-in) - A simple mod that adds fade-in animation for chunks!
- [**Chunky**](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunky) - Pre-generates chunks, quickly and efficiently
- [**Chunky Border**](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunkyborder) - An add-on for Chunky which lets you create and manage world borders
- [**Cloth Config API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - Configuration Library for Minecraft Mods
- [**Clumps**](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps) - Clumps XP orbs together to reduce lag
- [**Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) - A Fabric mod designed to improve the chunk performance of Minecraft.
- [**Entity Culling**](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - Using async path-tracing to hide Block-/Entities that are not visible
- [**FPS - Display**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fpsdisplay) - A simple Fabric mod that displays the current FPS on screen.
- [**Fabric API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - Lightweight and modular API providing common hooks and intercompatibility measures utilized by mods using the Fabric toolchain.
- [**Fabric Language Kotlin**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - This is a mod that enables usage of the Kotlin programming language for Fabric mods.
- [**Fast IP Ping**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-ip-ping) - Yeet the laggy reversed DNS lookup for literal IP server addresses
- [**FastQuit**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastquit) - Lets you return to the Title Screen early while your world is still saving in the background!
- [**FerriteCore**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - Memory usage optimizations
- [**Flashback**](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback) - Record your Minecraft gameplay, play it back and create stunning cinematic shots
- [**Gamma Utils (Fullbright)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils) - Gamma / Brightness / Night Vision mod, making it easy to see in the dark. Basically Fullbright for Fabric.
- [**In-Game Account Switcher**](https://modrinth.com/mod/in-game-account-switcher) - This mod allows you to change your logged in account in-game, without restarting Minecraft
- [**Indium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - Sodium addon providing support for the Fabric Rendering API, based on Indigo
- [**Iris Shaders**](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - A modern shader pack loader for Minecraft intended to be compatible with existing OptiFine shader packs
- [**Krypton**](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) - A mod to optimize the Minecraft networking stack
- [**Lithium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - No-compromises game logic/server optimization mod
- [**Mod Menu**](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed.
- [**ModernFix**](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) - All-in-one mod that improves performance, reduces memory usage, and fixes many bugs. Compatible with all your favorite performance mods!
- [**More Chat History**](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory) - Increases the maximum length of chat history.
- [**No Chat Reports**](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports) - Makes chat unreportable (where possible)
- [**Resourcify**](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify) - In-game resource pack, data pack and shader browser and updater
- [**Simple Voice Chat**](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat) - A working voice chat in Minecraft!
- [**Smooth Scrolling**](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-scroll) - Smoothly scrolls chat, hotbar, creative inventory and much more!
- [**Sodium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - The fastest and most compatible rendering optimization mod for Minecraft. Now available for both NeoForge and Fabric!
- [**Very Many Players (Fabric)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric) - A Fabric mod designed to improve server performance at high playercounts.
- [**World Host**](https://modrinth.com/mod/world-host) - Host your singleplayer worlds without having to run a server or setup port forwarding!
- [**WorldEdit**](https://modrinth.com/mod/worldedit) - A Minecraft Map Editor... that runs in-game!
With selections, schematics, copy and paste, brushes, and scripting.
Use it in creative, or use it temporarily in survival.
- [**Axiom**](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom) - The all-in-one tool for editing Minecraft Worlds.

</details>


# Thanks
A big shoutout to the mod developers, as they work so hard to keep Modrinth running :).
